title: Psadan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Psadan_UAA.jpg]] |name=Psadan |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]][[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height=1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Armor-like plates |lifespan= |origin=[[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' |habitat= |diet=Carnivorous |language=[[Psadan (language)|Psadan]] }} {{Quote|Any idea whether those alien species are hostile toward strangers?''"
"''Probably. Most alien species are. Shall we go?|Gilad Pellaeon and Thrawn, landing on Wayland|''[[Heir to the Empire]]''}} The '''Psadan''' were one of the indigenous races of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. They were covered with lumpy plates that made them resemble walking, talking rocks, Scientists believe they were evolved from hard-shelled mammals. They were a warlike species and often [[Myneyrsh–Psadan wars|fought]] the neighboring [[Myneyrsh]]. They were one of the races that the cloned and insane [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] master [[Joruus C'baoth]] kept under his rule at the foot of [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]]. When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded, the Psadan and Myneyrsh tried to fight back and were mostly exterminated, the rest fleeing into jungles. ==Psadans in the galaxy== In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] known as the [[Twirling Twi'lek]] was visited by a Psadan [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He watched one of the establishment's table dancers while sitting alongside a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] and a [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]]. This visit to the cantina was interrupted when a [[Unidentified Whiphid (Twirling Twi'lek)|Whiphid]] attacked and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], an infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].[[Star Wars: Jango Fett (one-shot)|''Star Wars: Jango Fett'']] During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Looie]], a Psadan, operated the redemption center of [[The Rig]], the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] headquarters of the [[Crimson Nova]] chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]].[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]]
